base.hirText:
RegDefUsed1: (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef mvar eaUsed index) <-
      (RegDefUseUsed eaUsed mvar index),
      (RegDefUseBlockLastDef eaUsed eaDef mvar)

LiveVarUsed1: (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed blk mvar eaUsed index) <-
      (RegDefUseUsedInBlock blk eaUsed mvar index),
      (NOT (RegDefUseBlockLastDef eaUsed _gen5 mvar))

recursive.hirText:
RegDefUsed2: (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef varIdentity eaUsed index) <-
      (RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd blk blockUsed mvar),
      (RegDefUseLiveVarDef blk varIdentity mvar eaDef),
      (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed blockUsed mvar eaUsed index)

RegDefUsed2: (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef varIdentity eaUsed index) <-
      (RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd blk blockUsed mvar),
      (RegDefUseLiveVarDef blk varIdentity mvar eaDef),
      (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed blockUsed mvar eaUsed index)

RegDefUsed3: (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef mvar nextEaUsed nextIndex) <-
      (RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed eaUsed nxtBlk mvar),
      (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef mvar eaUsed _gen1),
      (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed nxtBlk mvar nextEaUsed nextIndex)

RegDefUsed3: (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef mvar nextEaUsed nextIndex) <-
      (RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed eaUsed nxtBlk mvar),
      (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef mvar eaUsed _gen1),
      (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed nxtBlk mvar nextEaUsed nextIndex)

RegDefUsed3: (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef mvar nextEaUsed nextIndex) <-
      (RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed eaUsed nxtBlk mvar),
      (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef mvar eaUsed _gen1),
      (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed nxtBlk mvar nextEaUsed nextIndex)

RegDefUsed4: (RegDefUseDefUsed eaDef reg eaUsed index) <-
      (RegDefUseReturnValUsed _gen2 callee reg eaUsed index),
      (RegDefUseReturnBlockEnd callee _gen3 _gen4 blockEnd),
      (RegDefUseBlockLastDef blockEnd eaDef reg)

RetValUsed: (RegDefUseReturnValUsed eaCall callee reg eaUsed indexUsed) <-
      (ArchReturnReg reg),
      (RegDefUseDefUsed eaCall reg eaUsed indexUsed),
      (DirectCall eaCall callee)

LiveVarUsed2: (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed retBlock reg eaUsed index) <-
      (RegDefUseReturnBlockEnd callee _gen6 retBlock retBlockEnd),
      (NOT (RegDefUseBlockLastDef retBlockEnd _gen7 reg)),
      (RegDefUseReturnValUsed _gen8 callee reg eaUsed index)

LiveVarAtPriorUsed: (RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed eaUsed blockUsed mvar) <-
      (RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd blk blockUsed mvar),
      (RegDefUseUsedInBlock blk eaUsed mvar _gen9),
      (NOT (RegDefUseDefinedInBlock blk mvar))

LiveVarAtBlockEnd1: (RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd prevBlock blk mvar) <-
      (BlockNext prevBlock prevBlockEnd blk),
      (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed blk mvar _gen10 _gen11),
      (NOT (RegDefUseFlowDef prevBlockEnd mvar blk _gen12))

LiveVarAtBlockEnd2: (RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd prevBlock blockUsed mvar) <-
      (RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd blk blockUsed mvar),
      (NOT (RegDefUseRefInBlock blk mvar)),
      (BlockNext prevBlock _gen13 blk)

hirSExpr:
(hir-program
(stratum 0 simple
  :members @["RegDefUseDefUsed", "RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd", "RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed", "RegDefUseLiveVarUsed", "RegDefUseReturnValUsed"]
  (base-variant :name RegDefUsed1
  :var-order @["eaUsed", "mvar", "index", "eaDef"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, mvar, eaUsed, index))
  :body (RegDefUseUsed(eaUsed, mvar, index):@[0, 1, 2] ⋈ RegDefUseBlockLastDef(eaUsed, eaDef, mvar):@[0, 2, 1])
)
  (base-variant :name LiveVarUsed1
  :var-order @["blk", "eaUsed", "mvar", "index", "_gen5"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed(blk, mvar, eaUsed, index))
  :body (RegDefUseUsedInBlock(blk, eaUsed, mvar, index):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ ~RegDefUseBlockLastDef(eaUsed, _gen5, mvar))
)
)
(stratum 1 recursive
  :members @["RegDefUseDefUsed", "RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd", "RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed", "RegDefUseLiveVarUsed", "RegDefUseReturnValUsed"]
  (recursive-variant :name RegDefUsed2
  :delta-at 0
  :var-order @["blk", "blockUsed", "mvar", "varIdentity", "eaDef", "eaUsed", "index"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1, 2]
  :head (RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, varIdentity, eaUsed, index))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd(blk, blockUsed, mvar):@[0, 1, 2] ⋈ RegDefUseLiveVarDef(blk, varIdentity, mvar, eaDef):@[0, 2, 1, 3] ⋈ RegDefUseLiveVarUsed(blockUsed, mvar, eaUsed, index):@[0, 1, 2, 3])
)
  (recursive-variant :name RegDefUsed2
  :delta-at 2
  :var-order @["blockUsed", "mvar", "blk", "eaUsed", "index", "varIdentity", "eaDef"]
  :clause-order @[2, 0, 1]
  :head (RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, varIdentity, eaUsed, index))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseLiveVarUsed(blockUsed, mvar, eaUsed, index):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd(blk, blockUsed, mvar):@[1, 2, 0] ⋈ RegDefUseLiveVarDef(blk, varIdentity, mvar, eaDef):@[2, 0, 1, 3])
)
  (recursive-variant :name RegDefUsed3
  :delta-at 0
  :var-order @["eaUsed", "mvar", "nxtBlk", "eaDef", "nextEaUsed", "nextIndex"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1, 2]
  :head (RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, mvar, nextEaUsed, nextIndex))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed(eaUsed, nxtBlk, mvar):@[0, 2, 1] ⋈ RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, mvar, eaUsed, _gen1):@[2, 1, 0, 3] ⋈ RegDefUseLiveVarUsed(nxtBlk, mvar, nextEaUsed, nextIndex):@[1, 0, 2, 3])
)
  (recursive-variant :name RegDefUsed3
  :delta-at 1
  :var-order @["eaUsed", "mvar", "nxtBlk", "eaDef", "nextEaUsed", "nextIndex"]
  :clause-order @[1, 0, 2]
  :head (RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, mvar, nextEaUsed, nextIndex))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, mvar, eaUsed, _gen1):@[2, 1, 0, 3] ⋈ RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed(eaUsed, nxtBlk, mvar):@[0, 2, 1] ⋈ RegDefUseLiveVarUsed(nxtBlk, mvar, nextEaUsed, nextIndex):@[1, 0, 2, 3])
)
  (recursive-variant :name RegDefUsed3
  :delta-at 2
  :var-order @["nxtBlk", "mvar", "eaUsed", "eaDef", "nextEaUsed", "nextIndex"]
  :clause-order @[2, 0, 1]
  :head (RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, mvar, nextEaUsed, nextIndex))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseLiveVarUsed(nxtBlk, mvar, nextEaUsed, nextIndex):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed(eaUsed, nxtBlk, mvar):@[1, 2, 0] ⋈ RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, mvar, eaUsed, _gen1):@[1, 2, 0, 3])
)
  (recursive-variant :name RegDefUsed4
  :delta-at 0
  :var-order @["callee", "reg", "blockEnd", "_gen2", "eaUsed", "index", "_gen3", "_gen4", "eaDef"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1, 2]
  :head (RegDefUseDefUsed(eaDef, reg, eaUsed, index))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseReturnValUsed(_gen2, callee, reg, eaUsed, index):@[1, 2, 0, 3, 4] ⋈ RegDefUseReturnBlockEnd(callee, _gen3, _gen4, blockEnd):@[0, 3, 1, 2] ⋈ RegDefUseBlockLastDef(blockEnd, eaDef, reg):@[2, 0, 1])
)
  (recursive-variant :name RetValUsed
  :delta-at 1
  :var-order @["eaCall", "reg", "eaUsed", "indexUsed", "callee"]
  :clause-order @[1, 0, 2]
  :head (RegDefUseReturnValUsed(eaCall, callee, reg, eaUsed, indexUsed))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseDefUsed(eaCall, reg, eaUsed, indexUsed):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ ArchReturnReg(reg):@[0] ⋈ DirectCall(eaCall, callee):@[0, 1])
)
  (recursive-variant :name LiveVarUsed2
  :delta-at 2
  :var-order @["callee", "_gen8", "reg", "eaUsed", "index", "_gen6", "retBlock", "retBlockEnd", "_gen7"]
  :clause-order @[2, 0, 1]
  :head (RegDefUseLiveVarUsed(retBlock, reg, eaUsed, index))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseReturnValUsed(_gen8, callee, reg, eaUsed, index):@[1, 0, 2, 3, 4] ⋈ RegDefUseReturnBlockEnd(callee, _gen6, retBlock, retBlockEnd):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ ~RegDefUseBlockLastDef(retBlockEnd, _gen7, reg))
)
  (recursive-variant :name LiveVarAtPriorUsed
  :delta-at 0
  :var-order @["blk", "mvar", "blockUsed", "eaUsed", "_gen9"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1, 2]
  :head (RegDefUseLiveVarAtPriorUsed(eaUsed, blockUsed, mvar))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd(blk, blockUsed, mvar):@[0, 2, 1] ⋈ RegDefUseUsedInBlock(blk, eaUsed, mvar, _gen9):@[0, 2, 1, 3] ⋈ ~RegDefUseDefinedInBlock(blk, mvar))
)
  (recursive-variant :name LiveVarAtBlockEnd1
  :delta-at 1
  :var-order @["blk", "mvar", "_gen10", "_gen11", "prevBlock", "prevBlockEnd", "_gen12"]
  :clause-order @[1, 0, 2]
  :head (RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd(prevBlock, blk, mvar))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseLiveVarUsed(blk, mvar, _gen10, _gen11):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ BlockNext(prevBlock, prevBlockEnd, blk):@[2, 0, 1] ⋈ ~RegDefUseFlowDef(prevBlockEnd, mvar, blk, _gen12))
)
  (recursive-variant :name LiveVarAtBlockEnd2
  :delta-at 0
  :var-order @["blk", "blockUsed", "mvar", "prevBlock", "_gen13"]
  :clause-order @[0, 2, 1]
  :head (RegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd(prevBlock, blockUsed, mvar))
  :body (ΔRegDefUseLiveVarAtBlockEnd(blk, blockUsed, mvar):@[0, 1, 2] ⋈ BlockNext(prevBlock, _gen13, blk):@[2, 0, 1] ⋈ ~RegDefUseRefInBlock(blk, mvar))
)
)
)
